Visit Thaizen

Nestled along the historic Jalan Magazine in George Town, Thaizen Wellness & Spa is your urban retreat. Walk-ins welcome — or book ahead to secure your preferred time.

📍

Address

197 & 199, Jalan Magazine, 10300 George Town, Pulau Pinang, Malaysia

🕙

Operating Hours

Daily: 10:00 AM – 10:00 PM

📞

Contact

WhatsApp or call to enquire and book

🚗

Getting Here

Next to St. Giles Wembley Hotel · Street parking on Jalan Magazine
